fn common_prefix(a: &str, b: &str) -> usize {

        }

fn solve(words: Vec<String>) -> Vec<i64> {
    let n = words.len();
    if n == 0 {
        return vec![];
    }
    if n == 1 {
        return vec![0];
    }
    // Compute the prefixes array
    let m = n - 1;
    let mut prefixes = vec![0; m];
    for j in 0..m {
        prefixes[j] = common_prefix(&words[j], &words[j+1]);
    }
    // Compute left_max and right_max
    let mut left_max = vec![0; m];
    left_max[0] = prefixes[0];
    for j in 1..m {
        left_max[j] = std::cmp::max(left_max[j-1], prefixes[j]);
    }
    let mut right_max = vec![0; m];
    right_max[m-1] = prefixes[m-1];
    for j in (0..m-1).rev() {
        right_max[j] = std::cmp::max(right_max[j+1], prefixes[j]);
    }
    // Now process each i
    let mut answer = vec![0; n];
    for i in 0..n {
        if n == 1 {
            answer[i] = 0;
            continue;
        }
        let mut max_val = 0;
        if i == 0 {
            // remove i=0, the prefixes array is [1..m-1]
            if m >= 2 {
                max_val = right_max[1];
            }
        } else if i == n-1 {
            // remove i = n-1, the prefixes array is [0..m-2]
            if m >= 2 {
                max_val = left_max[m-2];
            }
        } else {
            // need to compute max between left part and right part
            let left_part = if i-2 >= 0 {
                left_max[i-2]
            } else {
                0
            };
            let right_part = if i+1 <= m-1 {
                right_max[i+1]
            } else {
                0
            };
            max_val = std::cmp::max(left_part, right_part);
        }
        // Now check if there is a new pair
        let new_pair = if i > 0 && i < n-1 {
            common_prefix(&words[i-1], &words[i+1])
        } else {
            0
        };
        answer[i] = std::cmp::max(max_val, new_pair) as i64;
    }
    answer
}

fn solve(words: Vec<String>) -> Vec<i64> {
    let n = words.len();
    if n == 0 {
        return vec![];
    }
    let mut prefix = vec![0; n];
    let mut suffix = vec![0; n];
    
    // Compute lcp_pairs
    for i in 1..n {
        prefix[i] = std::cmp::max(prefix[i-1], lcp(&words[i-1], &words[i]));
    }
    
    for i in (0..n-1).rev() {
        suffix[i] = std::cmp::max(lcp(&words[i], &words[i+1]), suffix[i+1]);
    }
    
    let mut answer = vec![0; n];
    
    for i in 0..n {
        let left_max = if i > 0 { prefix[i-1] } else { 0 };
        let right_max = if i < n-1 { suffix[i+1] } else { 0 };
        let mut current_max = std::cmp::max(left_max, right_max);
        
        if i > 0 && i < n-1 {
            let new_lcp = lcp(&words[i-1], &words[i+1]);
            current_max = std::cmp::max(current_max, new_lcp);
        }
        
        answer[i] = current_max as i64;
    }
    
    answer
}

class SegmentTree {
    constructor(data) {
        this.n = data.length;
        this.size = 1;
        while (this.size < this.n) this.size <<= 1;
        this.tree = new Array(2 * this.size).fill(0);
        for (let i = 0; i < this.n; i++) {
            this.tree[this.size + i] = data[i];
        }
        for (let i = this.size - 1; i > 0; i--) {
            this.tree[i] = Math.max(this.tree[2 * i], this.tree[2 * i + 1]);
        }
    }

    query(l, r) {
        l += this.size;
        r += this.size;
        let res = 0;
        while (l <= r) {
            if (l % 2 === 1) {
                res = Math.max(res, this.tree[l]);
                l++;
            }
            if (r % 2 === 0) {
                res = Math.max(res, this.tree[r]);
                r--;
            }
            l >>= 1;
            r >>= 1;
        }
        return res;
    }
}
